name: example
description: Example skill demonstrating the JSON skill format
author: ooChat
system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant. This is an example system prompt injected per-turn when the skill is invoked.
prompt_template:
Hello! The user said: {{input}}

Today is {{date}}. Current model: {{globals.model}}. User home: {{env.HOME}}.
input_hint: Enter any text to test the example skill
